title: limniris spuria
intro: Limniris spuria, also known as Ornithogalum montanum, is a plant species within the Asparagaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is valued for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Limniris spuria include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its roots or leaves in water, which can then be used as a tea or applied topically as a poultice.
